response.justification: Bogdan has broad engineering experience across languages and domains, including Java and JVM-related work in past roles, but lacks demonstrable deep expertise in enterprise Java/Kotlin tooling, Spring, or IDE internals — his recent work is dominated by TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with no clear evidence of contributing to IDE subsystems or JVM tooling at scale.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with diverse languages including Java and DLang
Proven track record in building developer tooling and open-source projects
Strong communication and teaching background with workshops and talks
concerns: No recent or prominent Java/Kotlin IDE or JVM tooling work in last 4+ years
Primary recent tech stack is TypeScript/Node.js, not enterprise JVM ecosystems
Lacks explicit experience with Spring, Quarkus, Hibernate, or build tool integration
